Title: Director of Biosafety
Bio: Leading Japan's biosafety program since 2018. Previously WHO consultant on laboratory biosafety. Expert on BSL-4 facility design and operation. Published extensively on risk assessment frameworks for high-consequence pathogen research.

Title: Programme Officer - Health Security
Bio: Coordinates disease surveillance across 15 African Union member states. Background in epidemiology (LSHTM). Led the data infrastructure buildout for Africa CDC's regional surveillance network during COVID-19.

Title: Program Officer - Biosecurity
Bio: Manages OP's $30M+ annual biosecurity grantmaking portfolio. Previously research analyst at Johns Hopkins Center for Health Security. Expertise in pandemic preparedness policy and GCR prioritization.

Title: Former PM - Biological Technologies Office
Bio: Managed $200M+ portfolio of programs including Pandemic Prevention Platform (P3) and PREEMPT. Now consulting independently on biodefense technology strategy. Deep relationships across DoD biodefense ecosystem.

Title: Senior Fellow
Bio: Specialist in biological weapons governance and CBMs. Advised multiple BWC delegations. Research focus on verification technologies for biological disarmament.
